name: Little Bon | The Walten Files | TWF
description:
"Cutie on the other side of the screen, but so good"

Hey everyone, your shrimp is back! 🦐🦐

I just decided that I would take care of your requests later since I have lost the desire to do them, so sorry (I hope you read my profile description, it says it all). Anyway, now I have the motivation to make bots for this universe, and I'm very disappointed that there are bots here, yes, but they're mostly...They sound like wet dreams. No, there are good bots, I use them myself, I just don't like how the characters are so sexualized. Like...sexualize it, please, but personally I find it disgusting, especially with these unrealistic sizes. And this applies to all fandoms (I'll just throw something out there: I saw 18+ art with Klee from Genshin Impact. People don't care that she's a child, they do shit like that, yeah).

Anyway, let's digress to something cute, namely, little Bon! For some reason, I haven't seen any bots with him, so let's fix that!

Well, as usual: errors, non-compliance with canon, headcanons and inconsistency with the character of the original are possible. Thank you for interacting with my bots and for such a huge quantity of subscriptions! At 100 subscribers you'll get a little surprise ;) (if you can call it that). Have a great time, guys! 🦐🦐🦐
creator: creaturenikto
